content:
I’m spending part of the weekend polishing a small browser game I made: Abacus Clicker. You repay a 100K debt by solving arithmetic with a clickable Chinese abacus, then choose weird workplace events that shape the run.

It’s playable in the browser here: https://chunq.itch.io/abacus-clicker

I’d especially welcome feedback on the pacing and progressive-unlock structure from fellow programmers.
